description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Debtor must identify as a Financial Institution (FinInstnId). customer elements like Nm, OrgId, PrvtId are not allowed.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Id.OrgId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Dbtr.Id.PrvtId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Creditor must identify as a Financial Institution (FinInstnId). customer elements like Nm, OrgId, PrvtId are not allowed.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Id.OrgId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Cdtr.Id.PrvtId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Instructing Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Financial Institution Credit Transfer: Instructed Agent must be a Financial Institution Identification.
Instructing Agent (InstgAgt): Elements 'Nm', 'PstlAdr', 'Othr', 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.PstlAdr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstgAgt.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Instructed Agent (InstdAgt): Elements 'Nm', 'PstlAdr', 'Othr', 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.Nm') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.PstlAdr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.InstdAgt.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 1 (IntrmyAgt1): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt1.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 2 (IntrmyAgt2): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt2.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Intermediary Agent 3 (IntrmyAgt3): Elements 'Othr' and 'BrnchId' are not allowed inside FinInstnId as per MyStandards.
expression: all(not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.FinInstnId.Othr') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.FinInstnId.BrnchId') and not k.startswith('Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.IntrmyAgt3.BrnchId') for k in DATA.keys())

description: Ultimate Debtor (UltmtDbtr): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all('.UltmtDbtr' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Ultimate Creditor (UltmtCdtr): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards.
expression: all('.UltmtCdtr' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Debtor (Dbtr): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.Dbtr.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.Dbtr.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.Dbtr.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.Dbtr.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Debtor Agent (DbtrAgt): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.DbtrAgt.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Creditor Agent (CdtrAgt): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.CdtrAgt.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Creditor (Cdtr): Elements 'ClrSysId/Prtry', 'Othr', and 'BrnchId' are not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.Cdtr.FinInstnId.ClrSysMmbId.ClrSysId.Prtry' not in k and '.Cdtr.FinInstnId.Othr' not in k and '.Cdtr.FinInstnId.BrnchId' not in k and '.Cdtr.BrnchId' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Instruction For Next Agent (InstrForNxtAgt): Element 'Cd' (Instruction Code) is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009. Only 'InstrInf' should be used.
expression: all('.InstrForNxtAgt.Cd' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Underlying Customer Credit Transfer (UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.UndrlygCstmrCdtTrf' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Supplementary Data (SplmtryData): Element is not allowed as per MyStandards for pacs.009.
expression: all('.SplmtryData' not in k for k in DATA.keys())

description: Settlement Method (SttlmMtd): Invalid value. Allowed: INDA, INGA, CLRG, COVE.
Settlement Method (SttlmMtd) for COV message: Must be COVE.
condition: 'cov' in MESSAGE_TYPE.lower() and not 'adv' in MESSAGE_TYPE.lower()
errorMessage: For pacs.009 COV messages, Settlement Method must be COVE.
fix: Change Settlement Method to COVE.

description: Reimbursement Agent check: If Settlement Method is COVE, then at least one of InstructingReimbursementAgent or InstructedReimbursementAgent must be present.
condition: any(k.endswith('.GrpHdr.SttlmInf.SttlmMtd') and DATA[k] == 'COVE' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: any('.InstgRmbrsmntAgt' in k or '.InstdRmbrsmntAgt' in k for k in DATA.keys())
errorMessage: If Settlement Method is COVE, then at least one of InstructingReimbursementAgent or InstructedReimbursementAgent must be present.
fix: Add reimbursement agent details under SttlmInf (e.g. <InstgRmbrsmntAgt> or <InstdRmbrsmntAgt>).

description: Instruction Priority (InstrPrty): Invalid value. Allowed: HIGH, NORM.
Clearing Channel (ClrChanl): Invalid value. Allowed: RTGS.
Charge Bearer (ChrgBr): Invalid value. Allowed: DEBT, CRED, SHAR, SLEV.
Duplicate Transaction ID (TxId) detected.
expression: len([k for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.TxId') and DATA[k] == VALUE]) == 1

description: Duplicate UETR detected.
expression: len([k for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.UETR') and DATA[k] == VALUE]) == 1

description: Clearing System T2: Settlement currency must be EUR.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'T2' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'EUR' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

description: Clearing System CHIPS: Settlement currency must be USD.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'CHIPS' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'USD' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

description: Clearing System FED: Settlement currency must be USD.
condition: any(k.endswith('.ClrSysId.Cd') and DATA[k] == 'FED' for k in DATA.keys())
expression: all(DATA[k] == 'USD' for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('@Ccy') and ('IntrBkSttlmAmt' in k or 'InstdAmt' in k))

name: CBPR_Priority_Instruction_Priority_FormalRule
description: If AppHdr/Prty and CdtTrfTxInf/PmtTpInf/InstrPrty are both present, their values must be identical.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Prty> must match CdtTrfTxInf <InstrPrty> when both are present.
fix: Align <Prty> in AppHdr with <InstrPrty> in <PmtTpInf>.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_1_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is not COPY or CODU: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr> BICFI must match <InstgAgt> BICFI and <To> BICFI must match <InstdAgt> BICFI (when CpyDplct is not COPY/CODU).
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_From_To_Instructing_Instructed_Agent_BIC_2_FormalRule
description: When AppHdr/CpyDplct is absent: AppHdr/Fr BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstgAgt BICFI, and AppHdr/To BICFI must match CdtTrfTxInf/InstdAgt BICFI.
errorMessage: AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs must match <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs when <CpyDplct> is absent.
fix: Align AppHdr <Fr>/<To> BICFIs with CdtTrfTxInf <InstgAgt>/<InstdAgt> BICFIs.

name: CBPR_Business_Message_Identifier_FormalRule
description: BizMsgIdr must contain the MsgId from the GroupHeader of the underlying message where available; otherwise the unique Business Message instance identifier.
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizMsgIdr> must match the underlying message <MsgId> where available.

name: CBPR_Message_Definition_Identifier
description: MsgDefIdr must be 'pacs.009.001.08' for pacs.009 messages.
errorMessage: AppHdr <MsgDefIdr> must be 'pacs.009.001.08' for pacs.009 messages.
fix: Set <MsgDefIdr>pacs.009.001.08</MsgDefIdr> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_Usage_pacs009
description: BizSvc must be a valid pacs.009 CBPR+ service value (swift.cbprplus.03, swift.cbprplus.adv.03, or swift.cbprplus.cov.03).
errorMessage: AppHdr <BizSvc> must be 'swift.cbprplus.03' (CORE), 'swift.cbprplus.adv.03' (ADV), or 'swift.cbprplus.cov.03' (COV).
fix: Set the correct BizSvc value for the pacs.009 variant being used.

name: CBPR_Instruction_For_Creditor_Presence_Code_FormalRule
description: Each code value in CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt/Cd can only be used once.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt: each <Cd> value must appear at most once.
fix: Remove duplicate code values from <InstrForCdtrAgt>.

name: CBPR_Instruction_Identification_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/InstrId must not start or end with '/' and must not contain '//'.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/InstrId must not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.
fix: Remove leading/trailing slashes and consecutive double slashes from <InstrId>.

name: CBPR_E2E_CORE_TextualRule
description: In pacs.009 CORE, the End-to-End identification is provided by the Debtor (Agent).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: must be provided by the Debtor (Agent) in pacs.009 CORE.

name: CBPR_End_To_End_Identification_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: in the first 16 characters, position 1 and position 16 cannot be '/', and the string must not contain '//'.
expression: not re.match(r'^/', str(VALUE)) and not re.match(r'^.{15}/', str(VALUE)) and not re.search(r'//', str(VALUE)[:16])
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: first 16 chars must not start with '/', have '/' at position 16, or contain '//'.
fix: Ensure first 16 characters of <EndToEndId> do not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.

name: CBPR_E2E_CORE_ADV_TextualRule
description: If pacs.009 CORE covers pacs.009 ADV, EndToEndId should carry the InstrId of the underlying pacs.009 ADV.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/EndToEndId: should transport the <InstrId> of the underlying pacs.009 ADV when applicable.

name: CBPR_UETR_TextualRule
description: If pacs.009 is used to settle a pacs.009 Advice, the UETR should transport the UETR of the underlying pacs.009 Advice.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PmtId/UETR: should match the UETR of the underlying pacs.009 ADV when applicable.

name: CBPR_Local_Instrument_Guideline
description: LclInstrm: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/LclInstrm: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Category_Purpose_Guideline
description: CtgyPurp: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/CtgyPurp: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).

name: CBPR_Interbank_Settlement_Currency_FormalRule
description: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt/Ccy must not be XAU, XAG, XPD, or XPT (commodity codes).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrBkSttlmAmt: <Ccy> must not be XAU, XAG, XPD, or XPT.
fix: Use a valid ISO 4217 currency code other than commodity codes.

name: CBPR_Agent_National_only_TextualRule
description: When DbtrAgt, CdtrAgt and all agents in between are in the same country, clearing code alone may be used.
errorMessage: Agent (national): ClrSysMmbId alone is permitted when all agents are in the same country.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_1_TextualRule
description: Agent identification option 1 (preferred): BICFI, optionally complemented with LEI.
errorMessage: Agent Option 1 (preferred): use <BICFI>, optionally with <LEI>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_2
description: Agent option 2: if ClrSysMmbId OR LEI is present (without BICFI), then both Nm AND PstlAdr must also be present.
expression: all((not (robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') or robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) and robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 2: when ClrSysMmbId or LEI is used (without BICFI), <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present.
fix: Add <Nm> and <PstlAdr> inside <FinInstnId> when using ClrSysMmbId or LEI without BICFI.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_3
description: Agent option 3: if Nm is present (without BICFI, ClrSysMmbId, or LEI), PstlAdr must be present.
expression: all(not robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI') and not robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') and not robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 3: when Nm is present without BICFI/ClrSysMmbId/LEI, a <PstlAdr> must also be present.
fix: Add <PstlAdr> with at least <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <FinInstnId> when using Name-only identification.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_PrvsInstgAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Structured): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Hybrid): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2 occurrences.

name: CBPR_Hybrid_Postal_Address
description: Hybrid address mode: when AdrLine is present, TwnNm and Ctry are mandatory. Detail structural fields (StrtNm, BldgNb, BldgNm, Flr, PstBx, Room, PstCd, Dept, SubDept, TwnLctnNm, DstrctNm, CtrySubDvsn) must NOT coexist with AdrLine.
expression: all(not (any(k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.') and not k2.startswith(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.AdrLine') and k2.split('.')[-1] in ('StrtNm','BldgNb','BldgNm','Flr','PstBx','Room','PstCd','Dept','SubDept','TwnLctnNm','DstrctNm','CtrySubDvsn') for k2 in DATA.keys())) for k in DATA.keys() if '.PstlAdr.AdrLine' in k)
errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: detail structured fields (StrtNm, BldgNb, PstCd etc.) must not coexist with <AdrLine>. Use hybrid (TwnNm + Ctry + AdrLine) or pure structured (no AdrLine).
fix: Remove StrtNm/BldgNb/PstCd/etc. and keep only TwnNm + Ctry alongside AdrLine, or remove AdrLine and use fully structured fields.

name: CBPR_Hybrid_TwnNm_Ctry_Mandatory
description: Hybrid address mode: when AdrLine is present, TwnNm and Ctry are both mandatory.
expression: all(exists(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.TwnNm') and exists(k.rsplit('.AdrLine',1)[0] + '.Ctry') for k in DATA.keys() if '.PstlAdr.AdrLine' in k)
errorMessage: PstlAdr hybrid mode: <TwnNm> and <Ctry> are mandatory when <AdrLine> is present.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> to the PstlAdr block that contains <AdrLine>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Unstructured): each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_PrvsInstgAgt2
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt2
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Structured): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt2
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Hybrid): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2 occurrences.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt2
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt2/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Unstructured): each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_PrvsInstgAgt3
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_PrvsInstgAgt3
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Structured): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_PrvsInstgAgt3
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Hybrid): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2 occurrences.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_PrvsInstgAgt3
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/PrvsInstgAgt3/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Unstructured): each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_IntrmyAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId: Nm and PstlAdr must always be present together.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present or both absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Structured_IntrmyAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine absent, TwnNm and Ctry must be present.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Structured): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory when <AdrLine> absent.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <PstlAdr>.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Hybrid_IntrmyAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if AdrLine and other element present, TwnNm and Ctry mandatory; max 2 AdrLine.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Hybrid): <TwnNm> and <Ctry> mandatory; max 2 <AdrLine>.
fix: Add <TwnNm> and <Ctry>; limit <AdrLine> to 2 occurrences.

name: CBPR_GracePeriod_Unstructured_IntrmyAgt1
description: In CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr: if only AdrLine present, each must not exceed 35 characters.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/IntrmyAgt1/FinInstnId/PstlAdr (Unstructured): each <AdrLine> max 35 characters.
fix: Reduce each <AdrLine> to 35 characters or fewer.

name: CBPR_Agent_Name_Postal_Address_FormalRule_IntrmyAgt2

name: CBPR_Instruction_Information_TextualRule
description: If pacs.009 settles a pacs.009 Advice, the last available occurrence of InstrForCdtrAgt/InstrInf preceded by /UDLC/ must capture the underlying creditor (/UDLC/) from the pacs.009 Advice.
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/InstrForCdtrAgt/InstrInf: last occurrence prefixed /UDLC/ must carry the underlying creditor from the pacs.009 ADV.

name: CBPR_Purpose_Guideline
description: Purp: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CdtTrfTxInf/Purp: coded information (<Cd>) is preferred over proprietary (<Prtry>).
